A negative balance, which may be due to such circumstances as a net overdraft as of the reporting period-end, is reported as $0 in Item B.2.f - Cash and cash equivalents not reported in Parts C and D. This is done in order to conform to the technical constraints of the XML type, which do not allow negative values in B.2.f.
